# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: linkerd-policy
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/cli
    description: "Default authorization policy for service mesh namespace - handles services without explicit authorization rules"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: ""
  proxyProtocol: unknown
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-allow-all-authenticated
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: default-authorization
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    description: "Default authorization policy allowing all authenticated meshed identities for service-to-service communication"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: linkerd-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: default-mesh-authentication
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-mesh-authentication
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: mesh-tls-auth
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    description: "Authenticates all meshed service identities within the cluster for default service-to-service communication"
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.linkerd-policy.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-unauthenticated
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: deny-unauthenticated
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    description: "Fallback policy to deny unauthenticated traffic - ensures services without explicit rules still require mesh identity"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: linkerd-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: deny-non-mesh-traffic
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: deny-non-mesh-traffic
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: deny-non-mesh
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    description: "Strict mesh TLS authentication - only allows identities from within the Linkerd trust domain"
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-health-probes
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: health-probe-auth
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    description: "Allow kubelet health probes for all pods in the namespace - required for liveness and readiness checks"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Namespace
    name: linkerd-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-network-auth
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: kubelet-network-auth
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: kubelet-network
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-framework
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    description: "Network authentication for kubelet health probes - allows traffic from cluster-internal networks"
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
